**Rensa Byoutou**  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/124615-7J7JOOM.jpg)  
**Full Title:** Rensa Byoutou  
**Japanese Title:** 連鎖病棟  
**Label:** Milky  
**Number of Episodes:** 2  
**Filesize:** 233MB  
  
**Description:**  
Shuji's father died during the operation when he was a student. After his death, he studied hard to be a doctor and started to doubt about his father's death. He gets the information that Takao, who performed his father's operation, is the vice director of Kiyosato Hospital at present. On his first day there, he meets Misako, Shuji used to love. But he is shocked to know that Misako is Takao's wife. Shuji makes up his mind to take a revenge on Takao since he took his father's life and his first love....

description:
NoneThe Ultimate Loli Doujinshi Collection  
\-----------------------------------  
  
So why did I make this torrent? Well long ago I recall a bunch of friends  
who claimed they have over 10k loli works, and they never shared anything,   
probably lying through their teeth, so from that moment on I decided  
that I will actually try to accomplish this goal myself. Something I truly have  
right now!  
  
And this time it stays true to its name. As of the time I write this,   
there are 12290 doujinshis in this collection, over 9500 of them  
are sorted and guaranteed to have no duplicates -- the other 2600 of   
them contain many duplicates and in a very big darn mess but they   
are all loli (or shota and some moe/nonh )  
  
So you ask, are there more then 10k Loli doujinshis shared here,   
Oh yes there are in fact. Most of the files are loli however not exactly   
everything.   
This torrent also contains:  
\* 400-500 Shota Doujinshis  
\* 400-500 Non-h books ( All of them contain obviously loli characters )  
\* ???-??? Books for circle completion of circles I enjoyed.  
But I can promise that more than 10000 items in this torrent contain loli.  
  
  
File structure:  
\* Cover  
 This folder contains all covers compressed in a 400x400 pixel  
 resolution. Grab this if you don't want to grab the entire torrent  
 to begin with and use it to help you locate what you truly wanna  
 download.  
\* Sort  
 This folder contains all files that have not been sorted into the well  
 sorted file structure list.  
\* Doujinshi  
 This folder contains ALL sorted doujinshis. They are all separated  
 by the circle names first letter from here on they are separated  
 by the circle name. All files are named well and it's  
 easy to find what you search for with this file structure.  
\* Doujinshi\\Multi  
 This folder is a bit special, it contains doujinshis that have more  
 than one circle. It's kind of hard to figure out  
 where exactly to put them so I made a separate folder for them.  
  
All files are in standard Japanese file formated names. I'm sorry but  
I have no plans to Romanise or translate the names into English, I don't see  
the point. If you want to do it yourself you can always use the Doujin   
Renamer application.  
  
I plan to continue to add torrents from here on, they will work as appendices  
to this torrent, don't expect them very often, maybe once or twice per year.  
The unsorted files will also be added to this appendices and won't be reshared  
from now on. Not even new unsorted files.  
  
If you have a lot of good doujinshis that would fit into a future appendix  
make torrents! name them ULDC ADDON so everyone knows that it contains  
more or fixed or better quality doujinshis to help and aid every collector  
out there.  
  
Feel free to share this torrent to as many sites and friends as you have!  
Also keep in mind that this torrent is pretty large it will take some time  
for it to be seeded out there, I will keep it seeded between 8-16 hours per day  
so don't be alarmed if there is no seeder online 24/7.  
  
This is also not the only torrent I will make, There will be a true loli manga  
torrent coming in the near future, it is at current stage 130GB, 2500 files.  
No Magazine is counted into this number, they are so shared and easy to obtain.  
If I did count them in it would be another 35GB 300 files.  
  
\----  
  
This torrent could not have been done without the help of an awesome tool   
I found on the net a few months ago. The Doujin Renamer.  
You can find it yourself here: http://doujinrenamer.wordpress.com/  
Maybe it can help you as well with your own collections. So if you should  
thank anyone for this torrent popup ( beside the obvious guys who have done  
the awesome work of drawing and scanning the books ( sorry not me either )   
thank this guy.
